response.body:
[{"hotelunkid":"34366","Hotel_Code":"26444","Hotel_Name":"Postcard Panarpani Retreat","City":"Pachmarhi","State":"Madhya Pradesh","Zipcode":"461881","Country":"India","Country_ISOCode":"IN","grade":"3","Property_Type":"Hotels","CountryAlias":"IND","BookingEngineURL":"https:\/\/live.ipms247.com\/booking\/book-rooms-postcardpanarpaniretreat","Hotel_Description":"From luxe camps to earthly lodges,  Postcard Panarpani Retreat<\/a><\/b> is the closest alternative for your  best hotel in Pachmarhi<\/a><\/b> . Located in Pachmarhi- a hill station in central India, that is situated at a height of 1067 m in the valley of Satpura Range. Head out to our eco-centered campsite, that’s going to be your next stop for wildlife\/safari holidays. Explore the famous Satpura Tiger Reserve, taking nature hikes to hidden waterfalls, ancient caves from prehistoric times, and Hindu mythologies and plenty more.
Camping in Pachmarhi with Postcard,<\/a><\/b> gives a unique jungle experience one could ever think of. Imagine having a trip into the lush green Satpura Forest Range, while camping on the tents, Over an Automobile. Sounds amazing. Isn’t it? Apart from that,  Postcard camp stay<\/a><\/b> comes with a cottage and tent stay facility on a sharing basis. Try our glamping pods located in the jungle and experience a mixed vibe of adventure and luxury.
Besides, resting comfortably at Postcard Panarpani Retreat, you can enjoy the stunning views of Pachmarhi and gigantic verdant mountains. Discover the fun of taking a walk through the jungle, along with the riverside camp accommodation, enjoying musical bonfires and barbeques. And finally, end your day with a series of fun activities while stargazing from your campsite.
Being a tourist retreat, Pachmarhi has a rich and rare flora and fauna, with numerous nature spots. Excellent for nature lovers, the rainforest has excellent spots for boating, enjoying green views, waterfalls, mountain streams, and wildlife throughout the region. Apart from natural beauty, discover the mythological Pandava Caves, with an approx. 10,000 years old cave paintings.

There’s a lot to unwind during your trip to Pachmarhi. Get a perfect experience of wild beauty and adventure with Postcard activity packages- Including Nights on a wheel<\/b><\/a>,  Splendid Pachmarhi<\/b><\/a>,  Satpura Jungle Picnic<\/b><\/a>,  The Raw Pachmarhi<\/b><\/a> and Satpura Riverside Camping, and more. Have your perfect jungle trip with camping over a jeep or comfy cottages in Pachmarhi. Just book your camping retreat at  Postcard Panarpani<\/b><\/a>. 
","Facilities_Attractions":"
Free parking<\/div> Daily housekeeping<\/span>
Ironing service Additional charge<\/span>
Laundry: Additional charge<\/span>
Designated smoking area<\/span>
Air conditioning<\/span>
Non-smoking rooms<\/span>
Invoice provided<\/span>
Luggage storage<\/span>
24-hour front desk<\/span><\/span>","Hotel_Policy":"

The property requires a duly signed Credit Card Authorization Form from the guest prior to accepting any credit card payments. If the guest refuses to sign or provide the authorization form, the property reserves the unequivocal right to cancel the booking and deny check-in<\/span><\/span><\/p>

    <\/ul>

    1. Our check-in time is 12.00 PM, the room will be allocated only after 12.00 PM . Arrangements can be made for early check-in depending upon availability. Check-out time is 10:00 AM, Charges are applicable for late check-out. Prior arrangements can be made for late checkout depending on the availability
    2. 100% payments to be made on or before check-in. No personal cheques are acceptable at the property.<\/b>
    3. All bookings are guaranteed. NO REFUNDS ARE MADE ON CANCELLATION or EARLY CHECKOUT.
    4. Proper Govt. approved Photo IDs are mandatory for check in. A copy of the document will be kept as a record as required by the law. No check-in will be granted to Guests below 18yrs, if not accompanied by a guardian
    5. All rooms are NON-SMOKING<\/b> and we request you to please adhere to the rule. Any incident of smoke or smell of smoke in the room will be charged @ Rs. 5000\/- per instance. Candle, incense, essential oils (diusing, vaporizing, etc.) are prohibited. These items and activities will be treated as smoking.
    6. We intend to offer our guest best hospitality, making sure, fresh linen is provided to all our esteemed guest. Any
    damages to the linen<\/b> will incur damage charges at actual replacement costs along with admin charges amounting to Rs. 1000\/- + Taxes (as applicable)\/item.
    7. Giving Good Experience to our guest is also our top most priority, please ensure no damages are made to hotel property. Incase of any damages, there will a repair charge at actual replacement costs along with admin charges of Rs. 5000\/- per item damaged.
    8. No Outside food and Alcohol will be permitted on the property. The same can be consumed only in Private rooms. All dormitory guests are requested to avoid from having food and alcohol in the dormitory. If found there will be cleaning charges of RS. 1500\/- per person.
    9. The breakfast timings are from 08:00 am to 10:30 am. The restaurant will be operational from 08:00 am to 10:30 pm.
    10. No visitors after 08:00 p.m. Visitors must notify Front Desk upon their arrival. Visitors must be accompanied by the registered guest at all times. Visitors are not allowed to go to the room or use guest amenities. As a registered guest, you are responsible for your visitor at all times.
    11.International Credit cards will be accepted with 3% additional bank charges.<\/span><\/span><\/p>
    ","Cancellation_Policy":"

    Cancellation & Refund Policy – Gypsy Adventures<\/div>
    (Applicable for Hotel Stays & Tour Packages)<\/div>
    <\/div>
    A. Individual Bookings (Not applicable to group bookings or discounted offers)<\/div>
    Cancellation 30 days or more before check-in\/start date – No cancellation charges<\/div>
    <\/div>
    Cancellation between 16 to 30 days before check-in\/start date – 25% of total package cost will be charged<\/div>
    <\/div>
    Cancellation between 10 to 15 days before check-in\/start date – 50% of total package cost will be charged<\/div>
    <\/div>
    Cancellation within 7 days of check-in\/start date – 100% of total package cost will be charged<\/div>
    <\/div>
    ","Parking_Policy":"Limited Parking is available at the property. Parking at our parking facility is at Owners risk. Postcard does not take any responsibility for your goods.
    ","CheckIn_Policy":"Check In 12:00 PM | Check Out 10:00 AM

    <\/b>
    ","Travel_Directions":"","ThingsToDo":"    Dining Facilities:<\/b>
      • Breakfast: 8:30 AM - 10:30 AM (Dining area)<\/li>
      • Lunch: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM (Dining area)<\/li>
      • Dinner: 8:00 PM - 10:30 PM (Dining area)<\/li>
      • Meals included in packages will not be served in rooms \/ cottages.<\/li>
      • Snacks are available from the menu in your room until 10:30 PM.


        Furniture and Property Care:<\/b><\/li>
      • We have provided comfortable and ambient furniture. Please do not move the furniture. Any damages may incur a charge up to Rs. 25,000 or the cost of the material.<\/li> Ensure the safety of your dependents\/children, as it remains your responsibility
      • The kitchen is closed between 3:00 PM and 6:00 PM.

        <\/li>
      • Music and Consumption Policy:<\/b>
        <\/li><\/ul><\/li>
      • As a jungle lodge, we request guests to refrain from playing loud music.<\/li>
      • Tobacco and paan are not permitted on the premises.<\/li>
      • Personal beverages should be consumed inside your accommodation only.

        <\/li>
      • Bathroom water is borewell-sourced and multi-layer sand and active carbon filtered (not RO\/UV treated). The water colour may be slightly yellow or red due to minerals.<\/li>
      • Drinking water is RO treated and safe to use.<\/li><\/ul>
        <\/div>
        • Network and Electricity:<\/b>
          • Limited network coverage with only Jio working in certain areas. Wi-Fi is available in common areas but may not be as strong as in cities.<\/li>
          • As property is situated in a remote location, Electricity supply may face low voltage issues. Backup generators are available but not for 24-hour use. There will be breaks in backup usage during full-day electricity failures (3 hours in the day and 3 hours at night).<\/li>
          • During backup usage, either the geyser or AC can be operational. Please inform the team when hot water service is needed.<\/li><\/ul><\/li><\/ul> Cleanliness and Environmental Responsibility:<\/b>
              • Do not litter or leave plastic bottles or poly-bags on the premises. Help us maintain the ambiance of a jungle lodge.<\/li>
              • Outside food and beverages are not allowed in public areas, except for medical\/health reasons or for children.
                <\/li><\/ul><\/li>
              • Guest Conduct:<\/b><\/li>
              • Panarpani Retreat is a family destination. We expect guests to behave respectfully, ensuring the comfort and sentiments of others are not infringed upon.<\/li>
              • Please follow our safety advice for everyone's well-being.<\/li>
              • The retreat is a non-smoking zone.
                Designated smoking areas are your private corridor, parking zone, and the open space at the Mahua Machaan. Dispose of cigarettes responsibly to avoid fire hazards and littering.

                Wildlife And Safety:<\/b><\/li>
              • Being in the Satpura forest, you may encounter insects, reptiles, or other wildlife. Inform our staff immediately if you encounter them.<\/li>
              • We use eco-friendly chemicals for control but recommend wearing shoes and following safety instructions given during check-in.<\/li>
              • Keep room doors closed to prevent incidents. We do not keep anti-venom doses on the property as per government norms.

                Pet Policy:<\/b><\/li>
              • Pets are allowed in guest rooms but should not damage property. Any damage is the responsibility of the pet parent.<\/li>
              • Pets must be on a leash when outside guest rooms and are not allowed in common or dining areas.<\/li>
              • Pet parents should bring necessary accessories for their pets. Our team does not provide pet care.

                Jungle Rules :<\/b><\/li>undefined
              • Stay on designated paths for safety and the health of the forest.<\/li>undefined
              • Respect wildlife, do not play loud music, and remain alert.<\/li>undefined
              • Dispose of trash properly and do not feed wildlife.<\/li>undefined
              • Avoid picking plants, climbing trees\/rocks, and lighting fires.<\/li>undefined
              • Adhere to forest laws and rules to respect wildlife and their habitat.undefined
                undefined
                undefinedActivities:<\/b><\/li>undefined
              • We offer various experiences such as jungle safaris, village walks, offbeat jungle activities, camping by the Denwa River, and private dinner arrangements.<\/li>undefined
              • Contact the reception lobby for details and bookings.<\/li><\/ul>","Children_ExtraGuest_Details":"undefined
                Child policiesundefined
                Children of any age are welcome.undefined
                To see correct prices and occupancy information, please add the number of children in your group and their ages to your search.undefined
                Cot and extra bed policiesundefined
                There is no capacity for cots at this property.undefined
                There is no capacity for extra beds at this property.undefined
                ","Booking_Conditions":"undefined1.<\/span>undefinedundefinedFor Group Bookings of more than 4 guests, intimation by email for cancellation has to be sent to the property email id at least 7 days prior to check in date and time for free cancellation<\/span>undefined
                undefined2. Group bookings that are not authenticated in advance by the Management, individual bookings made by different members of the same group, irrespective of source of booking can be cancelled at any point in time, without any prior notification<\/span>undefined
                undefined3. For bookings of more than 4 people or stays of more than 7 days, please email us on reservations@postcardhostel.com to get authorisation. Else, we reserve the right to terminate your booking without refunds<\/span>undefined
                undefined4. Accommodation in the same dorm room for Groups cannot be guaranteed<\/span><\/span>undefined
                undefined
                5. Our check out time is 10:00 AM and in case of any delays without prior intimation additional night charges will be applicableundefined
                6. 24-hour check-in permitted but the earliest check-in is 12:00 PMundefined
                7. If you are arriving very early, it is recommended you book the previous night. You are welcome to wait in our cafe area if you would like, but for 3-4 am arrivals, we recommend booking an extra night.undefined
                8.Entire amount of your accommodation payment must be made inundefinedADVANCE<\/b> at the time of check-in unless already paidundefined
                9. Guests will be asked to pay advance min 50% - 100% of the booking amount to confirm bookings by reservations team at any point after they make bookingundefined
                10. You understand & agree that your booking in a non-cancellable after Check in,undefinedNO REFUNDS<\/b> whatsoever shall be provided in case if you wish to cancel the booking or check out earlierundefined
                11. International Credit cards will be accepted with 2.5% additional bank chargesundefined
                12. The prices are exclusive of GST applied by Government & will be charged extra as per rates defined by the Governmentundefined
                13. We need a valid passport & visa for foreign nationals & valid Government Photo ID & Address proof like Driving license, Aadhar card for Indian nationals. Student IDs & PAN Cards are not valid Id proofundefined
                14. Non Residents \/ Visitors are strictly not allowed on the premisesundefined
                15. Pets are not allowed in Postcard Panarpaniundefined
                16. Please check at the front desk between 9AM – 9PM to extend your rooms. It is solely on availability & on current prices. Payment has to be made in advance for extensionundefined
                17. In case of any Offers the payment will be NON REFUNDABLE at any pointundefined
                18. To cancel your reservation, Intimation has to be sent by email to property email id prior to Expiry of free cancellation period. Otherwise the booking amount will be forfeitedundefined
                19. If you have booked a room through the use of a travel agency or an OTA (such as Booking.com, Expedia, etc), you must cancel \/ modify your booking through the same agencyundefined
                20. All our rooms areundefinedNon-Smoking<\/b>. In case of any instance of smoking in the room we will charge INR 5000 per instance.undefined
                21. We offer room service, however in case you spoil linen or room there will be a levy of replacement cost of procuring those items, transportation to our location plus an admin fee of INR 3000undefined
                22. In case of any other damages to our property, rooms etc. the cost of the same will be equivalent to replace it to the original state plus admin charges of INR 5000.undefined
                23. Please adhere to property policies. If you don't adhere to the policies management reserves the right to admissions. No refunds shall be provided if you are asked to vacate the premises in such conditionsundefined
                24. We are much better over email than phones. So email us with your questions before calling usundefined
